title: Chapter 89
content:
Chapter 89: Chapter 89: The Den of Hungry Lionesses

The corridors of the Jade Lotus Pavilion were a labyrinth of polished mahogany, intricate golden carvings, and delicate paper lanterns that cast a warm, sensual glow. But Kai barely noticed the architecture.

His attention was completely divided between the two very different, yet equally intoxicating, entities flanking him.

Walking just a step ahead was Madam Su Mei. With every click of her expensive heels, her wide, plush hips swayed side to side, causing the crimson silk of her tight qipao to stretch and pull over the massive, jiggling globes of her ass. The heavy scent of her rose perfume lingered in the air, a constant reminder of the explosive climax he had pulled from her just minutes ago in the carriage.

And floating right beside him, completely invisible to the mortal world, was Ahena.

Demoness was entirely naked, her glowing ruby skin radiating an unnatural, thrilling chill that contrasted sharply with the warm air of the Pavilion. She was hovering so close that her massive, gravity-defying demonic breasts were brushing right through Kai’s arm.

"You are walking into a den of hungry lionesses, Master,"

Ahena’s dark, telepathic voice purred directly into his mind, her long pink tongue darting out to lick her fangs.

"Can you smell them? The scent of bored, desperate women... it is thick enough to drown in."

Kai kept his face perfectly neutral, ignoring the demoness’s filthy whispers. He focused on Su Mei’s swaying back.

"We are here, Kai," Su Mei announced, coming to a halt in front of a massive set of sliding doors made of frosted glass and carved wood.

She turned around to face him. Her heavily lined eyes were dark, a wicked, triumphant smile playing on her glossy red lips. She reached out and adjusted the collar of his Academy uniform, letting her knuckles deliberately brush against his strong chest.

"Behind these doors is the Lotus Spring Room," Su Mei whispered, her sultry voice dropping an octave. "It is the most exclusive lounge in the entire inner city. The women inside are the wives of wealthy merchants, high-ranking officials, and powerful clan elders. They have all the money in the empire... and absolutely nothing to do with it."

She leaned in closer, her massive, heavy breasts pressing into his stomach.

"They are very demanding, Kai. But if you play your cards right... they will reward you very, very generously."

Kai swallowed, his throat suddenly feeling dry. The

Dragon’s Vitality in his blood was already humming, anticipating the hunt.

"I will do my best, Aunty Su Mei," Kai replied, injecting just a hint of nervous hesitation into his voice.

"Good boy."

Su Mei turned and pushed the sliding doors open.

Whoosh.

A thick cloud of warm, fragrant steam immediately billowed out into the hallway, carrying with it the overpowering scents of jasmine, lavender, and the undeniable, heavy musk of female bodies.

Kai stepped through the threshold, and his breath hitched.

The Lotus Spring Room was massive. The floor was made of heated white marble, centered around a large, bubbling hot spring pool that glowed with a faint, magical blue light. But it wasn’t the decor that stopped Kai in his tracks.

It was the women.

There were at least a dozen high-class noblewomen scattered around the room. Some were lounging on plush velvet cushions along the edges of the pool, while others were receiving foot rubs from female servants.

And they were all dressed in nothing but the thinnest, most translucent silk robes imaginable.

Because of the heavy steam and the heat of the hot spring, the sheer fabrics clung desperately to their sweating, flushed skin. It was a kaleidoscope of breathtaking, voluptuous flesh. Everywhere Kai looked, he saw massive, heavy breasts spilling out of loose collars, thick, creamy thighs parted lazily on silk pillows, and soft, plump asses resting against the marble.

The moment the heavy doors slid shut behind them, the soft chatter in the room instantly died.

A dozen pairs of eyes snapped toward the entrance.

When they saw a man—a tall, heavily muscled, incredibly handsome young man—standing in their private sanctuary, the entire atmosphere of the room shifted. It was like dropping a fresh, bleeding piece of meat into a pool of starving sharks.

"Ladies!" Su Mei called out, her voice ringing with the confident authority of the parlor’s owner. She stepped forward, gesturing elegantly toward Kai. "May I have your attention? I have a very special announcement."

A woman lounging near the edge of the pool slowly sat up. She was Lady Feng, the wife of a prominent silk merchant. She was wearing a sheer white robe that was completely soaked through from the steam, rendering it entirely transparent. Her breasts were enormous—two incredibly heavy, pale globes of flesh that rested directly on her stomach. Through the wet silk, Kai could clearly see her large, dark brown areolas and the hard, pebbled peaks of her nipples.

"Su Mei, darling," Lady Feng purred, her eyes dragging up and down Kai’s athletic frame. She licked her lips, adjusting her posture so her massive breasts heaved dramatically. "Who is this magnificent creature you’ve brought into our garden?"
